basic_details.job_title: Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt Hospital Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt Hospital (ABGH) has officially announced the Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 with 3 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advt No. F.2 (652)/ABGH/Advt./JR/2021/P-II/4020 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 30 years for General, 33 years for OBC, and 35 years for SC/ST candidates and hold an MBBS Degree from a recognized university with completion of internship on or before 20 July 2026 can submit their offline applications before 20 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply details are sh

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 30 years for General, 35 years for SC/ST, 33 years for OBC
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years for General category candidates. Age Relaxation: SC/ST candidates: 35 years OBC candidates: 33 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree from a recognized university and must have completed internship on or before 20.07.2026.
qualification.details: Junior Resident: MBBS Degree from a recognized university Completed internship on or before 20.07.2026. Candidate has not completed one year of Junior Residency in any recognized institution including regular & Adhoc period. Candidates, who have completed internship earlier than two years on 20.07.2026, shall not be eligible.

salary_details.details: Pay level 10 (Rs.56100-177500) plus allowances as admissible under rules.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt Hospital Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:asbh.delhi.gov.in .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt Hospital Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. content_sections.heading: Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt Hospital Junior Resident Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt Hospital Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website:asbh.delhi.gov.in . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt Hospital Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Junior Resident post at Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt Hospital is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Resident position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS Degree from a recognized university and have completed their internship on or before 20th July 2026 to be eligible for the Junior Resident post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to the Junior Resident role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 30 years for General category candidates. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST (35 years) and OBC (33 years) candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Junior Resident position announced by Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt Hospital in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: The Junior Resident post offers a salary as per Pay Level 10, which ranges from Rs. 56,100 to Rs. 1,77,500 per month, along with admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Resident post involves a Written Exam (MCQ Based) followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any experience required for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates should not have completed one year of Junior Residency in any recognized institution. Those who completed their internship more than two years prior to the application deadline are not eligible.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: The application for the Junior Resident post must be submitted in Offline mode. Candidates need to send their duly filled application form along with required documents to the specified address.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates must submit a set of self-attested copies of all certificates, marksheets, original ID, and two recent passport-size photographs along with the duly filled application form.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt Hospital located?
faq.answer: Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt Hospital is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110015. The application submission and interview will take place at this location.
